biosafetyDecision.authorities: Competent National Authority(ies) responsible for the decision or communication
biosafetyDecision.title: Title / Reference number of the decision or communication
biosafetyDecision.commonDecisions: Subject of the decision, notification, communication or declaration
biosafetyDecision.involvesFieldTrial: Does the decision involve field trials?
